settingsTabDescription: Sarrafa saituna da abubuwan da kake so.

newVersionAvailableDescription: Akwai sabon sigar manhajar. An shawarci ka sabunta shafin don samun sabbin abubuwa da gujewa matsaloli.

cookieBanner.title: Muna amfani da cookies 🍪
